race.description: Rmbl Investments Rising Stars Final F&M (Bm78) Hcp
race.comment: Tricky mare's race. MADIYYA (5) has to be forgiven for last start at Caulfield when covering ground and pulling up lame as a $3.40 chance. She was building nicely prior and finds a nice race but is starting to wear a bit thin. That said, she does look nicely placed back to Flemington blending in out wide. CHANGING COLOURS (3) ran a nice race first up for the new yard, getting back and working home well into fourth. Up to a mile should suit now and if she can land a touch closer she'll be hard to hold out. BARBIE'SDREAMWORLD (2) has been okay in two runs back, improving second up in the Leilani Final when fifth to Duchess Zou here last time. Up to her right trip now and looks well placed. SWEET JASMINE (1) is coming off a midweek win but did it well there and can prove hard to hold out. CAT NOIR (9) is consistent and a place chance again.
